Sources.Title: Jose Quintero — My Bloodwork Results: The Truth About My Biomarkers

TranscriptionNotes: Quintero introduces the dashboard as his own Vitals Vault lab results. At the start of the video he states that he is 34 and turning 35 in a few months; AgeYears preserves that subject-stated age rather than inferring or republishing a date of birth.

The dashboard visibly assigns all nine inputs to 18 June 2026: albumin 4.1 g/dL, creatinine 1.23 mg/dL, glucose 78 mg/dL, hs-CRP 1.1 mg/L, lymphocytes 39%, MCV 97.5 fL, RDW 13.8%, alkaline phosphatase 62 U/L, and white blood cell count 4.2 x10^3/uL.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
